args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%' OR (lower(title) LIKE '%street%' AND lower(title) LIKE '%hype%');

args.query: SELECT sale_id, track_id, country, store, units_sold, revenue_usd FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080);
